bead.title: repo hygiene: ignore DDx run-state sidecar directory
bead.description:
PROBLEM
`ddx work --watch` in this Fizeau checkout writes live attempt sidecars under `.ddx/run-state/`, and the directory is currently visible as untracked in `git status`. That keeps recreating dirty-tree noise while workers are merely alive.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
`.gitignore:26-36` ignores `.ddx/run-state.json`, `.ddx/executions/`, `.ddx/workers/`, and `.ddx/agent-logs/`, but it does not ignore the newer `.ddx/run-state/` directory. The live file observed during the current worker is `.ddx/run-state/20260515T075008-0c9b7363.json`.

PROPOSED FIX
Add `.ddx/run-state/` to the DDx runtime artifact ignore block and add a regression test that proves Git ignores files under that directory while leaving tracked DDx audit files unaffected.

NON-SCOPE
Do not ignore `.ddx/beads.jsonl`, `.ddx/attachments/`, or execution evidence that DDx commits as durable audit data. Do not change DDx runtime behavior; this bead only fixes this repository's ignore policy and test coverage.
bead.acceptance:
1. Add `.ddx/run-state/` to `.gitignore` next to `.ddx/run-state.json`.
2. Add `TestGitignoreIgnoresDDxRunStateDir` proving `git check-ignore .ddx/run-state/example.json` exits 0 from the repository root.
3. `go test . -run TestGitignoreIgnoresDDxRunStateDir -count=1` passes.
4. `go test ./... -count=1` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
